title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths · Protocol Clinic: Net Jump Host
summary: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net jump host increment in a least-privilege management access plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a hardened jump host as a controlled management choke point with MFA, recording, patching, and limited reach.
Choose SSH, GUI, API, or console management with encrypted transport, identity, least privilege, and logging.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
